contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Cutover test plan + ran PR2 /proxy/gas parity/functional tests + diagnosed live Rails 401
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/192
  
  Details:
  Created EDGAR_DAO_CUTOVER_TEST_PLAN.md, a per-route cutover test checklist linked into the execution roadmap. Ran the PR2 /proxy/gas tests I could run: all 6 read-safe GAS endpoints forward correctly through the Python proxy (HTTP 200 with each upstream's own JSON), OPTIONS returns 200 with CORS, unknown name returns 404, plus 5 mocked unit tests. Diagnosed a production finding: live Rails /proxy/gas returns 401 for every name because skip_before_action :require_login is a no-op (require_login is not a registered before_action) and a global filter (likely rate_limit_bot_calls) blocks the unauthenticated proxy calls; the Python port has no such filters and behaves as intended, so ramping fixes it. Flagged manual/operator items (write-GAS POST, Stripe test-mode, email-verification loopback, governor-signature events) and pending endpoints (PR3 through PR6 not yet implemented).
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
